examples: Now, a Unladen swallow retrospective confirms that the project is defunct and is no longer being developed.
The team has set a tight development schedule for Unladen Swallow, making quarterly milestone releases.
Unladen Swallow was an attempt to bring LLVM optimisations to the CPython runtime, but hasn't seen significant activity for the last year.
The K-MAX was selected because it can carry over 2, 700kg, which is more than its unladen weight.
The air suspension responds to the special burden of pickups, namely that they have to ride and handle well whether they are unladen or fully loaded.
